summary: Completed testing of in-app messaging center feature. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend modal and admin messages section fully functional.

landing_page_message_us_button.details: Message Us button in Connect section opens modal correctly

message_modal_form_fields.details: Modal contains required fields: name, email, message with proper validation

message_modal_info_banner.details: Info banner displayed explaining replies will be sent via email

message_submission_POST_api_messages.details: POST /api/messages/ creates message with correct status and data

admin_messages_section_display.details: Messages section visible in admin dashboard with unread count badge

messages_section_expand_collapse.details: Section expands to show message list with all message details

message_display_content.details: Messages show sender name, email, message content, and timestamp

reply_via_email_button.details: Reply via Email button present for each message (opens mailto: link)

mark_as_read_button.details: Mark as Read updates message status and removes unread indicator

delete_message_button.details: Delete button present and DELETE API removes message from database

GET_admin_all_messages.details: GET /api/messages/admin/all returns all messages sorted by date

validation_missing_fields.details: API returns 422 for missing name, email, or message

validation_invalid_email.details: API returns 422 for invalid email format

unauthorized_access_protection.details: Admin endpoints return 401/403 without auth token

test_credentials.admin_login: Enter code '4399' in email field on /login page

seed_data_creation: Test messages created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: In-app messaging center feature fully tested and working. POST /api/messages/ is public endpoint. Admin endpoints require Bearer token from login. Messages display in admin dashboard under collapsible 'Messages' section with unread count badge.
